notes: v2.4.18 — Notifications & Microsoft Teams engine, Operations Planner improvements, NCR filters + Customer Rejection category, RP queue dedupe, inventory project carry, Ops Intelligence viewer access, purchasing notes placement, and a REQ/PO search fix. Notifications: a redesigned settings panel to control each kind of planner update independently and choose in-app bell, Microsoft Teams, or both — with Teams rich cards and an Open in AOS button, immediate/hourly/daily-digest cadence per channel, grouped updates, per-item muting, and more of the moments that matter (added/removed, @mentions, blocks, due-date moves, comment replies, board-access changes) without self-pings. Planner: custom Gantt date ranges and zoom (week/2-week/month/quarter) with week-at-a-time scrolling, move an item to another group, more accurate parent roll-up, and richer activity history (tags, linked records, co-assignees). NCR: filter row wraps on smaller screens so every filter stays clickable, plus a new Customer Rejection category on +New NCR and in filters (TKT-00217). RP queue: every serialized part of a build now gets its own job (hotfixed to prod 2026-06-04). Inventory: received stock carries its PO's project and build (TKT-00215), and physical-inventory minimum temperature/humidity now save (TKT-00214). Operations Intelligence: admins can grant view-only Ops Intel Viewer access. Purchasing: Notes/Vendor Communications/Compliance card sits directly under the PO Total, and Pending (amber)/Cancelled (red) statuses stand out. Permissions: the Websites Admin flag now displays correctly. Also: a faster, searchable What's New browser, and a REQ/PO search timeout fix.
